rulings.Case Title: PETER ST. GEME et al VS. CHEVY CHASE BANK FSB, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Capital One, N.A.'S Motion To Compel Depositions Of Peter St Geme And Polly St Geme And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 7. Defendant Capital One, N.A.'S Motion To Compel Depositions Of Peter St. Geme And Polly St. Geme And For Sanctions. Grant motion to compel plaintiffs attendance at deposition. Each plaintiff to provide defendant with three dates between September 4 and September 18, 2012 they are available for deposition. From these dates defendant shall select one. If plaintiffs fail to provide dates by August 29, 2012 by 12 PM, plaintiff Peter St. Geme's deposition shall be at 9:30AM September 19, 2012 and plaintiff Polly St. Geme's deposition shall be at 9:30AM September 20, 2012. Both depositions to take place at defendant's office. Sanctions severally against plaintiffs in the amount of $2,500.00. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADOLOFO URTECHO et al VS. LUIS SEGURA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Premises Inspection - Ccp 2031
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFFs ADOLOFO URTECHO, SILVIA HURTADO, CARLOS SAMPALAJ and FLORIDALMA BAC's Motion To Compel Premises Inspection - Ccp 2031. Grant Motion to Compel limited to upper level and defendants' unit and common area. Moving party provided no authority for proposition that defendant' residency on the property effects damage. Deny Sanctions.

rulings.Case Title: ROXANA CASTRO, INDIVIDUALLY ANS ON BEHALF OF ALL VS. SANTOS BONILLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint; Declaration Of Mark Hooshmand
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF ROXANA CASTRO's Motion To Amend Complaint. Grant, no opposition filed. (501)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION ITS VS. JUANA INES TELLO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Bankruptcy status. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TBJ INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. SANJEEV KUMAR RAJ
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF TBJ INVESTMENTS, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to shift burden, i.e, no competent evidence in original papers; supplemental papers filed without court approval and untimely filing of supplemental. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIDGEWAY VISTA LP VS. STEVEN J. CESIO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF BRIDGEWAY VISTA LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to shift burden. No evidence re CCP 1161a(b)(1) which is basis for motion, instead provides evidence re 1161a(b)3. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRYANT COURTYARDS, LLC VS. HIEU NGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT HIEU NGO's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend. Opposing party failed to amend as directed in prior demurrer. First Amended Complaint paragraph 22 direct contradiction to paragraph 6 of the lease exhibit 1 to First Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. DINA ALAC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 27, 2012, line DEFENDANTs ROBIN DRAGICH and MATTHEW CRAIN's Motion To Quash. Continued to August 30, 2012 at 9:30 AM. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B, to provide court with courtesy copies by 4PM August 27, 2012. = (501/REQ)
